title: NANA Names John Aġnaaqłuk Lincoln as President and Chief Executive Officer
summary: ANCHORAGE, Oct. 6, 2021 – On October 5, 2021, during a special meeting, the NANA Board of Directors named John Aġnaaqłuk Lincoln as president and chief executive officer (CEO) of the company. Reporting directly to the NANA board, Mr. Lincoln will lead corporate initiatives to improve the quality of...
